hooks.prompt:
Review the code change for frontend performance issues. Check for:
1. Images without width and height attributes — causes Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) when images load
2. Large synchronous imports — importing heavy libraries (moment, lodash, chart.js) at top level instead of dynamic import()
3. Missing lazy loading — components or images below the fold loaded eagerly instead of using React.lazy() or loading='lazy'
4. Barrel file imports — importing from index.ts re-export files which defeats tree shaking and bundles unused code
5. Inline object/array creation in JSX props — creating new objects on every render defeats React.memo and causes unnecessary re-renders
6. Missing key prop or using array index as key — causes React to remount components on list changes instead of reordering
7. useEffect with missing or empty dependency array causing stale closures or infinite loops
8. Blocking the main thread — heavy computation in render, event handlers, or useEffect without requestAnimationFrame or Web Workers
9. Loading='lazy' on LCP image — the largest contentful paint image must NOT be lazy loaded, needs fetchpriority='high'
10. CSS @import inside stylesheets — serializes CSS loading into a waterfall, should use separate link tags for parallel loading

Respond {"ok": true} if no issues found, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue description"} if problems detected.
